
[both layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F2 main.tex — \setmainfont override present in source (required: no \setmainfont override (template loads Times / Arial))
      fix: Remove the font override; UF requires Times New Roman or Arial (cls:167-169 loads them); the override produces a non-conforming font.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f2--font-family

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.
